goal: Determine the amount raised, valuation, and lead investor of Safe Superintelligence (SSI)'s funding round reported in April 2025.
expected: Safe Superintelligence (Ilya Sutskever's startup) raised an additional $2 billion at a $32 billion valuation, reported April 2025, in a round led by Greenoaks (reported ~$500 million), with backers including Andreessen Horowitz, Lightspeed, DST Global, Alphabet, and Nvidia.
answer:
## Safe Superintelligence (SSI) — April 2025 Funding Round

Here are the key details of the funding round reported in April 2025:

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| **Amount Raised** | **$2 billion** |
| **Post-Money Valuation** | **$32 billion** |
| **Lead Investor** | **Greenoaks Capital Partners** ($500M commitment) |

### Additional Context
- **Other participants** in the round included Andreessen Horowitz, Lightspeed Venture Partners, DST Global, Alphabet, and Nvidia [1].
- This represented a **sixfold increase** in valuation compared to SSI's previous round in September 2024, when the company raised $1 billion at a $5 billion valuation [1][2].
- SSI was founded in June 2024 by **Ilya Sutskever** (former chief scientist at OpenAI), **Daniel Gross**, and **Daniel Levy** [1].
- This was SSI's second major fundraise in fewer than seven months [2].

citations.title: Ilya Sutskever's Safe Superintelligence raises $2B at $32B valuation – Calcalist Tech
citations.note: Details on amount raised, valuation, lead investor (Greenoaks, $500M), other investors, and valuation comparison to prior round.

citations.title: The 10 Biggest Rounds Of April: Safe Superintelligence's $2B – Crunchbase News
citations.note: Confirms $2B raised, $32B valuation, and Greenoaks Capital Partners as lead investor; notes it was SSI's second large raise in under 7 months.

confidence: high — both data points confirmed by two independent, authoritative sources (Calcalist Tech and Crunchbase) with full agreement on all three key figures.
